zh.lifeSummary: 當Renaud de Bourgogne II於1056年出生在法國福朗-可特艾度布斯貝桑c時，他的父親Guillaume Ier duc de Bourgogne37歲，母親Étiennette de Longwy-Metz22歲。他和Reine Kunizza Regina von Oltingen至少有2個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1102年5月17日在以色列מְחוֹז הַמֶּרְכָּז拉苗拉享年46歲，埋葬在土耳其哈代安塔吉亞安塔吉亞。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Renaud de Bourgogne II于1056年出生在法国福朗-可特艾度布斯貝桑c时，他的父亲Guillaume Ier duc de Bourgogne37岁，母亲Étiennette de Longwy-Metz22岁。他和Reine Kunizza Regina von Oltingen至少有2个儿子和2个女儿。他去世于1102年5月17日在以色列מְחוֹז הַמֶּרְכָּז拉苗拉享年46岁，埋葬在土耳其哈代安塔吉亞安塔吉亞。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bourgogne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Bourgoin
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Alphee, Alyre, Andre, Armand, Aurore, Celina, Emile, Gilberte, Jacques, Laurent, Lucienne, Olivier.

variant of Bourgouin (and, in North America, an altered form of this), a habitational name for someone from Burgundy (Old French Bourgogne), a region of eastern France having Dijon as its center. The area was invaded by the Burgundii, an ancient Germanic tribe from whom it takes its name, in about AD 480. The duchy of Burgundy, created in 877 by Charles II, King of the Western Franks, was extremely powerful in the later Middle Ages, especially under Philip the Bold (1342–1404; duke from 1363). Compare Bourgoyne and Bourguignon .

nameMeanings.name: Renaud
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Renaud de Bourgogne II was born in 1056, in Besançon, Doubs, Franche-Comté, France, his father, Guillaume Ier duc de Bourgogne, was 37 and his mother, Étiennette de Longwy-Metz, was 22. He had at least 2 sons and 2 daughters with Reine Kunizza Regina von Oltingen. He died on 17 May 1102, in Ramla, Central, Israel, at the age of 46, and was buried in Antakya, Antakya, Hatay, Türkiye.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Renaud de Bourgogne II est né en 1056, à Besançon, Doubs, Franche-Comté, France, son père, Guillaume Ier duc de Bourgogne, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Étiennette de Longwy-Metz, avait 22 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles avec Reine Kunizza Regina von Oltingen. Il est décédé le 17 mai 1102, à Ramla, Central, Israël, à l’âge de 46 ans, et a été enterré à Antakya, Antakya, Hatay, Turquie.

de.lifeSummary: Als Renaud de Bourgogne II 1056 in Besançon, Doubs, Franche-Comté, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Guillaume Ier duc de Bourgogne 37 und seine Mutter Étiennette de Longwy-Metz 22. Er hatte mit Reine Kunizza Regina von Oltingen mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 17. Mai 1102 im Alter von 46 Jahren in Ramla, Central, Israel und wurde in Antakya, Antakya, Hatay, Türkei begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Renaud de Bourgogne II è nato il nel 1056 nel Besançon, Doubs, Franche-Comté, Francia, il suo padre, Guillaume Ier duc de Bourgogne, aveva 37 anni e il suo madre, Étiennette de Longwy-Metz, aveva 22 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie con Reine Kunizza Regina von Oltingen. Morì il 17 maggio 1102, nel Ramla, Central, Israele, all'età di 46 anni, e fu sepolto a Antakya, Antakya, Hatay, Turchia.

ja.lifeSummary: Renaud de Bourgogne IIが1056年にフランスフランチェ-コムトeドウブズベサンcオンで生まれた時，父Guillaume Ier duc de Bourgogneは37歳，母Étiennette de Longwy-Metzは22歳であった。彼はReine Kunizza Regina von Oltingenとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1102年5月17日にイスラエルמְחוֹז הַמֶּרְכָּזラムラで46歳で死去し，トルコハティイアンタクヤアンタクヤにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Renaud de Bourgogne II(이)가 1056년 프랑스 프랭체-코트e 다브스 베산c에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Guillaume Ier duc de Bourgogne(은)는 37세였고, 그의 어머니 Étiennette de Longwy-Metz(은)는 22세였다. 그는 Reine Kunizza Regina von Oltingen(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1102년 5월 17일 이스라엘 מְחוֹז הַמֶּרְכָּז 램라에서 46세의 나이로 사망했으며 튀르키예 하타이 앤타키아 앤타키아에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Renaud de Bourgogne II nasceu em 1056, em Besançon, Doubs, Franche-Comté, França, seu pai, Guillaume Ier duc de Bourgogne, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Étiennette de Longwy-Metz, tinha 22 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas com Reine Kunizza Regina von Oltingen. Ele faleceu em 17 de maio de 1102, em Ramla, Central, Israel, com 46 anos, e foi sepultado em Antakya, Antakya, Hatay, Turquia.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Renaud de Bourgogne II родился в 1056 г. в местности бесанcон, доубс, фрэнче-комтe, Франция, его отцу по имени Guillaume Ier duc de Bourgogne было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Étiennette de Longwy-Metz, 22. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери от Reine Kunizza Regina von Oltingen. Он умер 17 мая 1102 г. в местности рамла, מְחוֹז הַמֶּרְכָּז, Израиль в возрасте 46 лет и был похоронен в местности антакя, антакя, хатеи, Турция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Renaud de Bourgogne II nació en 1056, en Besançon, Doubs, Franche-Comté, Francia, su papá, Guillaume Ier duc de Bourgogne, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Étiennette de Longwy-Metz, tenía 22 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas con Reine Kunizza Regina von Oltingen. Murió el 17 de mayo de 1102, en Ramla, Central, Israel, a la edad de 46 años, y fue sepultado en Antakya, Antakya, Hatay, Turquía.
